title: Mae's Sillypack
description: A quick mod pack made for my friends and I, nothing special!
body:
A mod pack made for my friends and me.

# About
I originally created this mod pack for my friends and me to enjoy together. While it's not perfect—since I’m still learning—I’ve done my best to make it fun and engaging. It currently includes enhanced terrain generation and additional content from mods like *Farmer's Delight*, among others.

I plan to update the pack over time, so keep an eye out for new versions, especially if you're running a server.

# Information
- **Recommended RAM:**  
  If you're hosting a server, I suggest allocating around **6 GB of RAM**. However, **4 GB** should also work fine—it's just nice to have some extra headroom.  
  The same recommendation applies if you're playing in singleplayer.
